title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 95.
content:
There was a Young Lady of Welling,
    Whose praise all the world was a-telling;
    She played on the harp,
    And caught several carp,
    That accomplished Young Lady of Welling.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 95."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
